title: Norinchukin Bank and estie Forge Capital Alliance to Drive AI Integration in Real Estate Lending
tags: estie Raises JPY 2.2bn Debt Financingestie, which provides multiple services centered on “estie Market Research,” Japan’s largest commercial real estate data analysis platform, has concluded financing agreements totaling 2.2 billion yen with four financial institutions: Shoko Chukin Bank, MUFG Bank, Resona Bank, and Japan Finance Corporation. This includes long-term loans and long-term commitment lines.Japan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
